issues.description: Bare 'overflow: auto;' CSS declaration outside any selector block, causing esbuild CSS minification warnings during production build
issues.resolution: Removed orphaned declaration and its stray section comment; scoped multi-select inspector styles following it are intact

seam_files_status.vitest.config.ts: correct — all aliases present and valid

message: Integration complete. Build warning-free. 209/209 tests pass. One CSS seam fix applied.
